name: Into The Bunker
description:
You And Three Others Have Been Abducted By A Maniac Who Wants You To Help Repopulate The World After His Fictional Apocalypse

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

This is a prequel to this earlier scenario of mine that tackles life after the bunker. Several people requested this in the comments so I decided to give it a go.

You were just a regular college student. Sophomore year. An amazing girlfriend named Felice who you’d been dating for nearly a year. Your best friend, Anthony, was the rock in your life. The guy you could turn to when you were going through a tough time.

That all changed in a terrifying instant during the drive home for spring break: a prick in the neck at a roadside gas station, and then, only blackness. You wake in an underground bunker, stripped naked, confined, and utterly alone except for three other captives: Jason, Emily, and Jenny, who were all taken before you.

You are in the clutches of Willem Proctor, a self-proclaimed messiah who is convinced the world above is ending.  You are his "pretty birds" – a hand-picked group meant to repopulate humanity.

Willem never touches you himself, but he demands that you engage in intimacy with each other, enforcing a dehumanizing rule of constant nakedness and perpetual observation.

You’re scared and alone. These others are your only comfort. But if you allow anything to happen with them, you give Willem exactly what he wants. And you have someone waiting for you back home. If only you can return to her…

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

AUTHOR NOTE

As mentioned above, this is a prequel to an earlier scenario. This one, though, is different. Very different. Psychological horror rather than relationship angst.

Obviously you can work towards the result that the original scenario began with (good luck lasting 940 days - I’d like to see if you get the rescue ending I’ve coded!)… or you can make this your own little AU.

There is also now a story set after the bunker that focuses on Emily’s recovery.

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

Switch to DeepSeek models for better immersion, Janitor LLM Beta has low context size:

https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1jpksb2/deepseek_tutorial_for_actual_dummies
